cells.xml_text_content: Nominal food expenditure share of disposable personal income (percentage)
cells.pdf_text_content: Nominal food expenditure share of disposable personal income (percentage)

cells.xml_text_content: FAH = food at home. FAFH = food away from home.
cells.pdf_text_content: FAH = food at home. FAFH = food away from home.

cells.xml_text_content: Note: Household final users include SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program) and WIC (Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children) purchases as well as food purchased by Government through social assistance programs. See the USDA, Economic Research Service (ERS) report, Measuring the Value of the U.S. Food System: Revisions to the Food Expenditure Series (2018) and the Food Expenditure Series Documentation page for more details.
cells.pdf_text_content: Note: Household final users include SNAP (Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program) and WIC (Special Supplemental Nutrition Program for Women, Infants, and Children) purchases as well as food purchased by Government through social assistance programs. See the USDA, Economic Research Service (ERS) report, Measuring the Value of the U.S. Food System: Revisions to the Food Expenditure Series (2018) and the Food Expenditure Series Documentation page for more details.

cells.xml_text_content: Source: Calculated by USDA, ERS from various sources, June 3, 2024.
cells.pdf_text_content: Source: Calculated by USDA, ERS from various sources, June 3, 2024.
